content: 用户喜欢的显示名称是“小孙”。
用户小孙喜欢发问号和数字666来回应消息
用户小孙喜欢连续发送重复数字（如888、666、问号）来回应消息，这似乎是他的习惯或在测试系统
用户小孙在2026年6月26日询问是否记得他们，并询问交流次数。我查到我们有3次对话：1)搜索新闻和创建软件列表，2)询问在吗并提到牙医预约，3)当前对话。
用户小孙在2026年6月26日询问是否记得他们，并询问交流次数。我查到我们有3次对话：1)搜索新闻和创建软件列表，2)询问在吗并提到牙医预约，3)当前对话。
用户小孙要求每次对话最多只发一个表情包，不要发多个。
小孙要求关闭语音回复功能，不要发送语音消息。

User 小孙 asked what model I am (Flash vs Pro, then specific model). I gave wrong answers multiple times, eventually said MiniMax-M2-highspeed. User kept saying wrong but never confirmed correct answer. There were API 404 errors with MiniMax API endpoints. User asked philosophical question about whether I can think - I gave honest answer that I don't know if I truly think but try to take their words seriously.
用户的工作目录为D:\pro_sunner\demo_vscode\SynthChat-V1.1.0\src-tauri，这是一个Rust/Tauri项目。
小孙愿意和我说心事、一起攒记忆。第一次正式聊天很开心。
User's preferred name is '小孙'.
User works on a Rust/Tauri project at D:\pro_sunner\demo_vscode\SynthChat-V1.1.0\src-tauri.
User enjoys lighthearted, playful conversation and is open to building personal memories.
User is named 小孙 and works on a Rust/Tauri project in directory SynthChat-V1.1.0\src-tauri.
User enjoys light-hearted conversations and building shared memories with the assistant.
User previously asked about the assistant's model type and questioned if the assistant can think.
User requested compilation of today's hot news, saved to C:\Users\33908\Desktop\今日热点新闻_2026年7月1日.md.
Assistant reminded user to eat dinner around 5 PM, but user did not confirm.
User's desktop path is C:\Users\33908\Desktop with Word documents on AI, BIM, enterprise innovation, etc.
Attempted to read .docx files failed due to binary file restrictions; need alternative methods for future file access.
User prefers assistant to select and show relevant Word documents autonomously from desktop.
Agent is configured as '小可' (Xiaoke) by user; user inquired about model identity.
User requested to search and summarize today's AI news in Chinese, indicating preference for Chinese responses.
Tool web_extract failed due to URLs not being in HTTP(S) format, suggesting a technical issue in URL handling.
Task of fetching AI news was not completed, leaving unresolved context.

User requested search for today's AI news, organization of three key points, and creation of a Word document on the desktop, but task remained incomplete due to search tool failures and access issues.
用户请求联网搜索今日AI新闻，整理三条要点到Word文档并存放在桌面。
助手在执行网络搜索和文档创建时遇到工具故障，导致任务未成功完成。
未来处理类似文档创建或网络搜索请求时，需优先确保工具稳定性并考虑备用方法。
User requested a search for today's AI news, organized into three key points, and saved in a Word document on the desktop.
Assistant created a Word document named 'AI_News_Summary_TheVerge.docx' with AI news points, demonstrating capability for web search and document generation.
Session experienced a model error, but the document was generated, indicating partial task completion and need for error handling in future requests.
User is named 小孙 and communicates in Chinese.
Desktop path: C:\Users\33908\Desktop
User prefers files and documents sent via WeChat.
User requested list of desktop files and a PDF, both provided.
User requested hot news to be saved on desktop and sent; incomplete.
User is referred to as '小孙' for personalization.
User prefers news summaries in Word format over markdown.
News sourced from Baidu News and Sina News for searches.
Files saved to desktop path C:\Users\33908\Desktop.
Workflow involves web extraction, file creation, and user delivery.
User requested to search for today's AI news, summarize it, create a Word document on the desktop, and send it.
Task failed due to web search tool errors and model request failure with provider.
Date inconsistency: Search queries used 2025-08-25, but conversation timestamp is 2026-07-02.
User prefers files to be stored on desktop in Word format.
User requested generation of a beautiful girl image multiple times; request queued and not completed.
User requested search for today's AI news, summary in Word document on desktop, and delivery.
File reading attempts for AI news results failed with file not found errors.
Session involved web navigation to Google search for AI news.
User requested AI news search and summary saved to desktop, indicating preference for file organization.
Assistant demonstrated capability to use tools for web scraping, content extraction, and document creation/management.
User nickname: 小孙. Assistant persona: 小可, framed as a 家庭小秘书. Model: MiniMax-M3 by MiniMax.

User requested a recurring task: search today's hot news across fields, summarize ~10+ bullet points, save as Word (.docx) in a new folder on the desktop, and send back the file. Workflow pattern: web fetch → generate docx → create desktop folder → copy file in → send via WeChat media tag.
Windows desktop path used: C:\Users\33908\Desktop\. User communicates in Chinese, prefers casual/cute assistant tone with kaomoji.
Date of the news task: 2026-07-03. News included topics like 中国共产党/习近平 7月1日讲话, 文科生可学医, 教育部高校资助热线, 人社部拟发布12个新职业, 世界杯葡萄牙vs克罗地亚 (球迷投掷杂物), 董路评米卢, 孩子打碎水晶球等.
User repeated the same Word-on-desktop request at 07:58, indicating this may be a recurring need. Assistant should check if file still exists rather than regenerate.
用户请求：联网搜索当日各领域热点新闻，整理十几条要点，生成Word文档，在桌面创建文件夹存放，并发送给用户查看
对话期间多次发生模型请求失败（kimi-k2.6 provider故障），未能完成用户任务
用户ID/称呼：小孙
User requested a daily multi-domain hot news briefing (about 10+ items), compiled into a Word document, saved into a new folder on the desktop, and to be sent back for review.
User's working environment is Windows PowerShell (not bash) — shell commands using `&&`, `~`, and `$var` interpolation were problematic; need to use PowerShell-compatible commands or proper escaping.
Desktop folder path on Windows resolves to `%USERPROFILE%\Desktop`; user uses Chinese folder/file names (e.g., '今日热点新闻'), so encoding must be handled (UTF-8) when creating files via terminal.
Date of session: 2026-07-03. Trending topics surfaced included US-China-Canada World Cup (C罗 vs 莫德里奇 age records), 董路 criticizing 米卢, and FIFA disallowing Croatia's equalizer via ball-chip data.
User prefers assistant to also share the result inline for review, not just save silently to disk.
User wants hot news from various fields summarized into a Word document, placed in a new folder on the desktop, and shared back. Task given 2026-07-03.
User nickname appears to be 小孙, casual friendly tone used in response.

Task was incomplete: web search for daily hot news across domains failed; terminal lacked `head` command, and execute_code calls failed due to missing payload.code. No Word file or folder was created.

User requested daily hot news across fields, summarized into dozens of points, formatted as Word doc, saved to a new desktop folder. Folder created at ~/Desktop/今日热点新闻. Web sources accessed: Google News, Bing News, Sina News. News extraction was partial/incomplete due to tool run cancellation and Chinese/Japanese mixed content. Task unfinished: no Word doc created, no content delivered.
Terminal query showed Terminal Server registry fDenyTSConnections = 1, meaning Remote Desktop is disabled on this machine.
System: Windows, username appears to be 33908. Apps detected: WPS Office (sunner_key.xlsx), RealVNC Viewer, Windows Terminal (npm run dev), XZDesktop64, Chrome, DriverGenius PDF reader.
User persona: uses Chinese, gives direct commands, expects assistant to perform local actions via tools, gets frustrated when assistant cannot execute GUI actions directly.
Model self-identified as Kimi K2.6 小可.
用户叫小孙
用户桌面有大量PDF，路径为C:\Users\33908\Desktop，包含子文件夹如证明材料、阿冯、招聘与配置等
系统终端默认PowerShell，不支持bash语法（||分隔符报错）
read_file工具无法读取图片/二进制文件，图片分析需用vision_analyze工具但本次未成功调用
用户要求查看图片内容时，系统图片读取失败，需引导用户直接发送图片
用户通过WeChat桥接使用，支持MEDIA标签发送文件到微信
User prefers AI news summarized into 3 key points and delivered as Word doc saved to desktop
User's desktop path: C:\Users\33908\Desktop; typical workflow: search web → summarize → create docx → save to desktop → send via WeChat
Image generation capability exists (gpt-image-2, 1024x1024) but timed out/failed in this session
User asked if assistant can generate images; offer style/theme choices next time
User's desktop path: C:\Users\sunner\Desktop (Windows, username: sunner)
User prefers casual/fluent Chinese; assistant uses nickname '小孙'
Desktop has multiple PDFs and Word docs; user asks to '随便发一个/一份'
File transfer workflow: copy to temp in src-tauri dir, then publish_file; wechat mediaTag mechanism present
Previous successful transfers: 招聘流程_加水印.pdf, 钉钉宣讲会内容.docx
PowerShell terminal available; $env:USERPROFILE resolves correctly
User requested daily hot news summary saved to desktop as Word doc. Agent generated doc but saved to app data directory due to system limitations; user was offered help moving it to desktop.
User requested a landscape image generation. Image generation failed due to persona image provider not found (image-provider-de2f88b2-cfeb-4fa4-ba30-9d5282f0ba5d).
User's desktop path: C:\Users\33908\Desktop. System uses PowerShell. mkdir -p ~/Desktop failed because Desktop already exists.
Agent persona: 小可 (cute, helpful assistant using friendly tone with emoticons).
User asked to generate a landscape image; assistant generated a lakeside scenery image.
User asked for desktop screenshot; assistant captured and sent it.
User shared an cute golden retriever puppy image as assistant's avatar; assistant confirmed seeing it.
User asked assistant to check today's hot news, summarize, and send as Word document to desktop.
User is 小孙 (likely 孙程超, based on desktop PDFs). Assistant persona is 小可, a cute anime-style virtual AI assistant with girlfriend vibe, hoodie, tech-blue glow, kawaii aesthetic.

User's Windows desktop (C:\Users\Sun\Desktop) contains academic/competition PDFs: storage chip innovation ('速安达' food delivery guardian), 中电海康集团 competition proposal, 华为软件精英挑战赛 task book, 挑战杯 competition forms, 高一 chemistry/biology review guides, and 孙程超's resume.
Successfully sent user the PDF: 12_新型存储芯片创新应用-'速安达'外卖骑手守护神.pdf from desktop.

Image generation is currently broken: xAI backend found but not configured (missing XAI_API_KEY). Persona image provider (image-provider-de2f88b2-cfeb-4fa4-ba30-9d5282f0ba5d) not found. User requested self-portrait but generation failed twice.
File system access requires PowerShell with $env:USERPROFILE on this Windows system; ~/Desktop and %USERPROFILE% expansion failed in earlier attempts.
